plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

### Bug Found: Off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts` line 7

**Root cause:** The `for` loop condition uses `i < items.length - 1` instead of `i < items.length`, causing the loop to stop one iteration short — the last element is always skipped.

### The Fix (one character change)

**`src/utils.ts`, line 7:**
```typescript
// Before (buggy)
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// After (fixed)
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### Impact on Tests (Vitest, `npm test`)
| Test | Before fix | After fix |
|---|---|---|
| should process all items in the array | ❌ fails | ✅ passes |
| should handle a single item | ❌ fails | ✅ passes |
| should handle two items | ❌ fails | ✅ passes |
| should return empty array for empty input | ✅ passes | ✅ passes |
| sum tests (×2) | ✅ passes | ✅ passes |

Approve the plan to proceed with the fix?
